hero.title: Sale and delivery of aggregates
hero.subtitle: You can order premium-quality materials from us. An individual approach and high-quality products are the key advantages of our company.

whyus.title: Why choose us
whyus.block1: We have been operating since 2000

equipment.title: Equipment rental.
equipment.subtitle: We operate our own fleet of modern construction equipment in Prague. We offer reliable solutions for earthworks, material transportation, and site preparation. We work efficiently and at competitive prices.

about.title: About SPEC-TRANS
about.subtitle: Our company has been operating for many years, earning a reputation in the market as a reliable and responsible partner. Our clients include some of the largest organizations. At the same time, both large companies and private individuals can count on an individual approach when ordering our services.

questions.title: Got questions?
questions.subtitle: Request a call back and learn more about our services!
questions.text: Submit your request and we’ll call you back in 10 minutes.
questions.agreeText: I agree to the processing of personal data

delivery.title: Delivery
delivery.subtitle: We provide prompt delivery of construction materials and special equipment throughout Prague and the surrounding areas. Your cargo will arrive on time and in complete safety.
delivery.item1: You leave a request through the website or by phone.
delivery.item2: We prepare an accurate cost estimate.
delivery.item3: We deliver the materials you ordered exactly on time.
delivery.item4: We ensure proper and timely document processing.

special.title: Special equipment rental
special.subtitle: We offer affordable rental terms for various equipment on a daily or long-term basis.

trucks.title: Dump truck rental
trucks.subtitle: We offer affordable rental terms for various trucks on a daily or long-term basis.

block1.title: Construction Sand
block1.subtitle: Quarry and river sand of all fractions. Ideal for concrete work, bricklaying, and foundation backfilling.

block2.title: Crushed Stone
block2.subtitle: High-strength crushed stone of various fractions for foundation pouring, road works, and concrete production. Resistant to frost and loads.

block3.title: Asphalt Millings
block3.subtitle: Recycled material from processed asphalt. Ideal for paving country roads, garage cooperatives, and parking lots. Moisture resistant.

block4.title: Black Earth
block4.subtitle: Humus-rich soil for landscaping, gardens, and orchards. Cleaned of weeds and stones. Ensures ideal plant growth.

errors.title: Page not found
errors.subtitle: Go to the homepage or contact us.
